step_by_step_thinking:
Tool Call: retrieve("association between Guillain-Barré syndrome and COVID-19 vaccination")

Retrieved Documents: 32 documents

First, write at most two sentences analyzing the retrieved evidence. Then state your clear answer choice using \boxed{A} or \boxed{B}. You MUST use the \boxed{} format for your final answer.
We are evaluating whether there is an association between Guillain-Barré syndrome and COVID-19 vaccines. From the retrieved evidence, multiple credible sources confirm that GBS has been specifically reported as a serious adverse reaction following administration of the Ad26.COV2.S vaccine. While the absolute risk remains very low, official warnings and surveillance systems acknowledge this link, supporting a documented association rather than mere theoretical possibility. Therefore, I conclude that there is indeed an association—even if rare—and thus align with option A.
